'''Death Watch Armor''' was the armor worn by a break-off of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warriors, the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]] by [[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]]. The armor was made of [[Beskar/Legends|beskar]], a metal found on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]], the homeworld of the Mandalorians, which made it almost indestructible. The Mandalorian helmet itself was unique to the Death Watch and consisted of a black, T-shaped visor with a complex heads up display.
